name: Sin Stacker
additional_info: Each stack of All the Dead Gods anti-heal increases the duration of subsequent All the Dead Gods anti-heal stacks by 1 second. For example, your first hit will apply anti-heal for 8 seconds, and your next hit will apply 9 seconds of anti-heal, and so on. Each stack of anti-heal has an independent duration, decaying independently of each other.
desc: Your All The Dead Gods' duration is now based on how many stacks of antiheal you already have on your opponent, increase your PvE Heal Boost to 10% as well.
